reviews.review_description: I really think this game would benefit from gamepad support and also make it so you can upgrade your ammo because 40 bullets with the machine gun goes quick! Other then that great game reminds me of doom in a way keep it up and hopefully add future updates.

I've played this game before on my GearVR and loved it. Now that I was gifted an Oculus Go, I'm comparing the 2 headsets. As stated above, there has been quite a few glitches in the graphics,  sometimes only losing words in the bars you click into and if I continue trying to play,  I also get bare basics of the rooms and unable to see the monsters; other times I'll just have a black screen and see nothing. The Oculus Go is difficult to back out of a game, and when you do get back to your library you need to play a different game before coming back in or you'll get the same problem with the screen. Can you please address this bug?
Need fix with the Samsung Controller
Your description said nothing about requiring the motion controller. I have the original gear VR and steelseries controller. And I just got taken for $4.

Like I said no menu no tutorial and why when I go into  my apps etc is it called " starship disco? "Hope I haven't wasted my time and money coz I was looking forward and really excited about this but alas "" BAHHH""so totally confused can't get passed first few seconds. Pitch dark go through first doors into what I don't known (a loading bay??)  To " you died " over and over any tips to get bloody moving on in this ahem possibly great game would be appreciated .Aha it's working now. Cracking game bit like doom or the old Alien games great stuff well done Mr or Missis developer. Lovin it
Any word on gamepad support for this title. It would make it alot easier to move around. The complications of movement, take away, what looks to be a pretty awesome and fun game.

reviews.review_title: Should have become a must-have, but...
reviews.review_description: Best experience I had with my gear VR, by far. It has everything one can hope for, free movement above all. So why only not 5 stars ? Some bugs need to be fixed  (hand cannon shots passing through flying mobs  even when obviously hit is very annoying) and there is worse : no gamepad support. Important reminder for the devs: All of us who own a first generation gear VR (the white one) had it sold without Samsung VR controller (it didn't exist back then) and typically use a bluetooth gamepad. Thus no gamepad support is a critical failure. Your game is awesome, but having to pay 40 bucks to play is just unacceptable.

reviews.review_title: Takes care of my Doom  jones.
reviews.review_description: Just dam amazing. Worth all the hard work. Thank you.

I've only made it to level but the first 3 levels are made up of the same four rooms slightly rearranged. Controls are nice once you get the hang of them. This game is more style than substance.  Four rooms over and over,  four enemies over and over,  four different weapons but you can only use one per play through6 and that's randomly selected for you.
